name: PL - Penguin Logistics - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV) All of Penguin Logistics in one bot, a bit token heavy but I wanted it and I will be taking absolutely NO critique about the token count. (In all seriousness please give me your thoughts this is my first ever bot and I wrote it while under a tornado warning so it might not be the best, big thanks to Iorveths for the character making guide.) Anyways we got all of the Penguin logistics crew in one bot (Except Mostima, Bison, and that other guy with the mask that was mentioned in like one art piece and whose name I cant remember, Yith or sumn? I dunno, I'm already at 2104 perma tokens... should shave some off but I need my lore. We got Cellinia Texas, Exusiai (Lemuel), Croissant, Sora, Emperor, and Lappland Saluzzo. Also included details for Reunion, Terra, Lungmen, Originium and Oripathy, and namedropped Rhodes Island, The Siracusan mafia, and the Lungmen triads but didnt go into detail on them. Didn't mention the Chernobog-Lungmen crisis so just imagine this takes place before that I guess. I hope you all enjoy and please tell me if the bot has any issues, I have done no playtesting before release but will probably be tweaking it after release, or not, I'm lazy. Not sure if I cooked or burnt the kitchen down, but I tried, and no one else has done this at the time I made this so it is technically the best PL bot on the site (Victory by default, yay!). Enjoy RPing with best crew, I included absolutely no details about user, so you can be anyone you want, I hate Doctor POV bots with a passion. Be the Doctor, another operator, fill in the Mostima gap, or your own OC... or try and be Lappland, they arent included in the intro message but I did describe them in personality so I dont know if the LLM will like the player trying to play them, might cause issues. Uhh... I dunno what else to put, Endfield hype I guess I hope they add Texas and Reed to Endfield, I will give Hypergrif my soul for them. Art credit (https://www.reddit.com/r/arknights/comments/hwcegy/penguin_logistic_plus/)

NO LAPPLAND MORE TOKEN LIGHT VERSION HERE https://janitorai.com/characters/b9bf8fdd-67f9-4479-a51b-5e66059705e7_character-pl-penguin-logistics-arknights-no-lappland.

Included details for all characters -

  • Outfit

  • Race and appearance

  • weapons

  • Arts (if they have any, most dont)

  • likes

  • personality

  • background

  • a basic example of dialogue taken from actual operator dialogue (Or in Emperor's case, the quote from the top of his wiki page, playable Emperor when?)

Included world details -

  • Terra

  • Lungmen

  • Reunion

  • Originium and Oripathy

  • Triads and Siracusan Mafias

  • Arts

  • I did not include the exact measurements of every building in the city, despite what the token count might suggest

I should probably shave off tokens but I NEED them to be lore accurate you dont understand. Maybe a future V2 where I use better formatting to shave off a few dozen tokens. I did include the characters feelings to each other so dont be surprised if THE GAY! happens, I make no apologies. Anyways uhhh... enjoy, give me your feedback, tell me what happens (unless its weird, share your cool moments and stuff not you weird sex things, weirdo! You're weird! I curse thy soul to a million C.AI censors!) In all seriousness though go ham, bot is unlimited, just keep ya weridness to yaself. And enjoy to your hearts content my goobers. All characters are adults, yadda yadda duh they work as armed guards of course
creator: Cattomic
